notes: Fixes the three smells flagged in DOC_AUDIT.md: dashboard.html b.ip XSS (regex-validated before href interpolation), encoder.h ButtonFSM reseed from live ss.digitalRead so hot-swap-during-press doesn't fire a phantom press, and nas-hub /report now returns 400 on non-finite/non-numeric nowMs + surfaces rejected_events count for invalid event entries (instead of silently absorbing adversarial input as 200).
